alerts.title: Telnet Usage Detected
alerts.detail: 10.0.0.30 is using Telnet (port 23) — credentials travel in cleartext.

alerts.title: Malicious Payload Pattern
alerts.detail: 10.0.0.99 → 10.0.0.1 | Pattern: (?i)(UNION.*SELECT|DROP.*TABLE|1=1) | Snippet: GET /?id=1' UNION SELECT username,password FROM users--
alerts.mitigation: Quarantine source host. Perform full forensic analysis.

alerts.title: Malicious Payload Pattern
alerts.detail: 10.0.0.99 → 10.0.0.1 | Pattern: (?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|/bin/sh|/bin/bash) | Snippet: POST /upload cmd.exe /c powershell -enc dGVzdA==
alerts.mitigation: Quarantine source host. Perform full forensic analysis.
